summary: Iteration 10 - CRM Kanban with AI Lead Scoring. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified including Kanban board, lead creation, lead detail page, AI scoring, stage changes, and delete functionality.
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via UI and API for testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified: Phase 4 CRM Kanban with AI Lead Scoring is fully functional. Features tested: 5-column Kanban board (new/qualified/proposal/won/lost), lead cards with name/company/phone/value/score, Add Lead modal, lead detail page with stage dropdown, AI Score via Claude API (returns score 0-100, analysis, next_action, stage_suggestion), Mark as Won/Lost buttons, Delete lead with confirmation. The AI scoring endpoint uses real Claude Sonnet via Emergent LLM Key (not mocked).

backend_apis: GET /api/leads - returns leads list with tenant filtering
POST /api/leads - creates new lead with name/phone/email/company/value/stage
PUT /api/leads/{id} - updates lead (stage, value, company, etc.)
DELETE /api/leads/{id} - deletes lead and returns {status: ok}
POST /api/leads/{id}/ai-score - AI analysis via Claude, returns score/reason/stage_suggestion/next_action
frontend_crm_page: CRM Pipeline header with subtitle 'Drag & drop leads between stages'
Stats row: Total Leads, Pipeline Value, Won, Conversion %
5 stage columns: New (gold #C9A84C), Qualified (blue #60A5FA), Proposal (purple #A78BFA), Won (green #4ADE80), Lost (gray #666666)
Lead cards with name, company icon, phone icon, value in gold
Score badge on cards (color-coded: green >=70, gold 40-69, gray <40)
Lead form: Name*, Phone, Email, Company, Value, Stage dropdown
frontend_lead_detail: Lead name as header with avatar initial
Stage badge with dropdown to change stage
Contact info: phone, email, company, value
AI Analysis section with Run AI Score button
After scoring: Score progress bar, Analysis text, Suggested stage button, Next action
Mark as Won / Mark as Lost quick action buttons
ai_integration: POST /api/leads/{id}/ai-score uses Claude Sonnet via Emergent LLM Key
Score persisted to lead record in database
UI displays score circle, analysis, and suggested actions

mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked. AI scoring uses real Claude API via Emergent LLM Key.
